name: viewport-extras
description: Verification suite for the 2026-05-30/31 viewport polish — zoom-to-selected (StatusBar button + `zs` shortcut), shift-click multi-select, selection-dim across personas, the Minimal qnode-nub fix, and ADR 0038's rendered-position-equals-junction-position contract. Programmatic assertions only (no pixel-diff). The shift-click handler path stays in manual-test territory since `__canarySelectNode` mutates the store directly rather than dispatching a real pointer event with shiftKey — the data-side multi-select is trivially correct because `store.selectNodes([…])` already accepts arrays.
